channel.title: Nginx on hanifmu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Nginx on hanifmu.com

item.title: Deploying NGINX on Heroku with Docker
item.description: We will try to deploy NGINX on Heroku with Docker. Heroku is a platform as a service (PaaS) that enables developers to build, run, and operate applications entirely in the cloud.

item.title: Cara Install Nginx di Centos 7
item.description: Tutorial ini menjelaskan bagaimana melakukan instalasi Nginx di CentOS 7.

item.title: Integrasi PHP-FPM dan Nginx di CentOS
item.description: Tutorial ini menjelaskan bagimana melakukan integrasi PHP-FPM dan NGINX di CentOS.

item.title: Enable Nginx Status Page
item.description: In this tutorial, I will show you how to add Nginx status page.
